blockingIssues.description: `.factory/init.sh --check` only verifies a few binaries and the AVD `.ini` sentinel, so broken or partially deleted SDK/AVD contents can incorrectly pass and skip repair, violating the promised idempotent bootstrap behavior.
Encrypted identity and snippet writes are not atomic: metadata is persisted before ciphertext without a Room transaction, so failures can leave partially persisted records.

The Room schema omits foreign keys for Host->Identity, SessionMetadata->Host, and Snippet->Host references while delete paths remove rows unconditionally, allowing orphaned records that violate the intended ownership model.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented local bootstrap host-tool prerequisites (`curl`, `tar`, `unzip`, `python3`, and `yes`) in `.factory/library/environment.md`.
Documented the `core:designsystem` module in `.factory/library/architecture.md` as the shared home for theme, scaffolds, and reusable UI primitives.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that when a feature adds or modifies Android instrumentation/UI tests, workers must run the affected `connectedDebugAndroidTest` coverage (or explicitly document why the emulator surface is unavailable) before handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `implement-local-data-and-security-foundation` feature added `androidTest` coverage but the handoff only reported `testDebugUnitTest` and `lintDebug`, leaving the emulator validation expectation ambiguous.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance for Droid-Shield false positives noting that workers may need additional non-functional formatting or placeholder-shape adjustments after replacing synthetic fixture literals, while still avoiding any real-looking secrets.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `implement-local-data-and-security-foundation` handoff reported needing formatting-only adjustments in addition to placeholder replacement to satisfy secret scanning, but that recovery pattern is not documented in the skill.
